creator: d.toschlaeger@googlemail.com
text:
While doing a portupgrade I encountered a missing or changed configure option for libfontenc-1.1.0

Output was:
..
===>  Configuring for libfontenc-1.1.0
configure: WARNING: unrecognized options: --enable-malloc0returnsnull
..

Fix: 

delete the configuration option
How-To-Repeat: Upgrading 'libfontenc-1.0.5' to 'libfontenc-1.1.0' (x11-fonts/libfontenc)
